title.en: China-to-Georgia Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入格鲁吉亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入喬治亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Georgia GEOSTM conformity requirements, GNERC grid-connection rules, GSE and distribution operator (Telasi / Energo-Pro Georgia) technical conditions, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-series EMC, 50 Hz 220/380 V grid settings, and EU/IEC alignment trajectory under DCFTA — versus China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与格鲁吉亚GEOSTM合格评定要求、GNERC并网规则、GSE及配电运营商（Telasi / Energo-Pro Georgia）技术条件、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000系列EMC、50 Hz 220/380 V电网参数，以及《深入和全面自由贸易协定》（DCFTA）框架下的欧盟/IEC对接轨迹——对比中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與喬治亞GEOSTM合格評定要求、GNERC併網規則、GSE及配電運營商（Telasi / Energo-Pro Georgia）技術條件、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000系列EMC、50 Hz 220/380 V電網參數，以及《深入和全面自由貿易協定》（DCFTA）框架下的歐盟/IEC對接軌跡——對比中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, GEOSTM conformity scope determination, GNERC grid-connection approval, GSE or distribution operator technical condition acceptance, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Georgia GEOSTM technical regulations, GNERC grid-connection rules, GSE and distribution operator (Telasi / Energo-Pro Georgia) connection conditions, and applicable IEC/EN standards with qualified professionals before shipment or installation. Georgia's regulatory framework is actively evolving under DCFTA EU alignment — requirements may have changed since this page was last verified.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、GEOSTM合格评定范围裁定、GNERC并网批准、GSE或配电运营商技术条件认可、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行格鲁吉亚GEOSTM技术法规、GNERC并网规则、GSE和配电运营商（Telasi / Energo-Pro Georgia）接入条件及适用IEC/EN标准。格鲁吉亚监管框架正在《深入和全面自由贸易协定》（DCFTA）欧盟对接框架下持续演进——相关要求可能在本页最后核验日期后已发生变化。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、GEOSTM合格評定範圍裁定、GNERC併網批准、GSE或配電運營商技術條件認可、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行喬治亞GEOSTM技術法規、GNERC併網規則、GSE和配電運營商（Telasi / Energo-Pro Georgia）接入條件及適用IEC/EN標準。喬治亞監管框架正在《深入和全面自由貿易協定》（DCFTA）歐盟對接框架下持續演進——相關要求可能在本頁最後核驗日期後已發生變化。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Georgia, the key practical gaps are: (1) GEOSTM conformity assessment — Georgia adopts IEC/EN standards under its DCFTA EU-alignment trajectory; Chinese GB/T documents are not automatically accepted; (2) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory, as these are the applicable safety standards under GEOSTM/IEC alignment; (3) IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance for GNERC-regulated grid connection; (4) IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-series EMC evidence; and (5) firmware validation against Georgia's 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid (CIS legacy parameters). Georgia is NOT an EAEU member — the EAC/TR CU certification route does not apply. The applicable route is IEC/EN conformity recognized by GEOSTM, plus GNERC and GSE/distribution operator grid-connection approval. Chinese GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines do not satisfy Georgia's IEC-aligned conformity requirements and cannot be substituted without supplementary IEC test evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口格鲁吉亚时，主要实际差距包括：（1）GEOSTM合格评定——格鲁吉亚在《深入和全面自由贸易协定》（DCFTA）欧盟对接轨迹下采用IEC/EN标准；中国GB/T文件不被自动接受；（2）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据，这是GEOSTM/IEC对接框架下适用的安全标准；（3）适用于GNERC监管并网的IEC 62116防孤岛合规；（4）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000系列EMC证据；（5）针对格鲁吉亚220/380 V、50 Hz电网（苏联遗留参数）的固件验证。格鲁吉亚不是欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员——EAC/TR CU认证路径不适用。适用路径为GEOSTM认可的IEC/EN合格评定，以及GNERC和GSE/配电运营商并网审批。中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准不满足格鲁吉亚的IEC对接合格评定要求，不可在没有补充IEC测试证据的情况下替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口喬治亞時，主要實際差距包括：（1）GEOSTM合格評定——喬治亞在《深入和全面自由貿易協定》（DCFTA）歐盟對接軌跡下採用IEC/EN標準；中國GB/T文件不被自動接受；（2）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據，這是GEOSTM/IEC對接框架下適用的安全標準；（3）適用於GNERC監管併網的IEC 62116防孤島合規；（4）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000系列EMC證據；（5）針對喬治亞220/380 V、50 Hz電網（蘇聯遺留參數）的韌體驗證。喬治亞不是歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員——EAC/TR CU認證路徑不適用。適用路徑為GEOSTM認可的IEC/EN合格評定，以及GNERC和GSE/配電運營商併網審批。中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準不滿足喬治亞的IEC對接合格評定要求，不可在沒有補充IEC測試證據的情況下替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
